entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench used in the study

entities.name: A2 CMS SYSTEM
entities.description: A cytoplasmic male sterility system evaluated for its efficiency in hybrid breeding

entities.name: A1 CYTOPLASM
entities.description: A widely used cytoplasmic male sterility system used as a comparison in the study

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing hybrid varieties to improve crop performance

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, where the research was conducted

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The location in Andhra Pradesh, India, where the research was carried out

entities.name: GCA
entities.description: General combining ability, referring to the average performance of a parent in a population of hybrids

entities.name: SCA
entities.description: Specific combining ability, referring to the performance of a specific hybrid relative to the expected value based on GCA

entities.name: NUCLEAR GENETIC BACKGROUNDS
entities.description: The genetic composition of the nucleus of the plant lines used in the study

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: A trait measuring the time until half of the plants in a population have flowered

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: A trait measuring the vertical growth of the sorghum plants

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: A trait measuring the amount of grain produced

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of parents to produce superior offspring in hybrid breeding
